title: Miradouro da Senhora do Monte
long_description: A calm, uncrowded viewpoint on one of Lisbon's highest hills, with panoramic views of the old town and the Tagus river.

title: Kotor Old Town
short_description: Medieval coastal town in a fjord-like bay
long_description: A walled medieval town on the Bay of Kotor with narrow stone streets, churches, and a steep climb to the fortress above.

title: Teide National Park
short_description: Volcanic landscape and Spain's highest peak
long_description: Volcanic terrain on Tenerife with a cable-car to the crater rim, lava fields, and very dark skies at night.
